spec_match.rationale: Each scenario uses the correct stripped/kept fields. The cookie-only/header/join-keys/server-side dedup framing reflects how ad-tech pipelines actually use debug keys.

interactive.rationale: Four scenario buttons swap the before/after panes, the checklist, and the team summary — distinct interactive surfaces per scenario.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Blurb promises pick-your-setup + tailored diff + checklist + team message — page delivers all four.

edge_cases.rationale: The server-side dedup scenario is now marked as a pipeline-breaking collision before and after selection; sharing/export of the selected checklist remains open.

design_system.rationale: CSS variables throughout, scenario button state overrides set background and color together, the critical badge/banner use design tokens, and dynamic panes render via DOM nodes instead of innerHTML.

openQuestions.title: Add a download-checklist button
openQuestions.detail: Once a scenario is picked, the visitor likely wants to share the checklist with their team. Add a 'copy as Markdown' button that serialises the visible checklist + summary so it can be pasted into a doc or PR.

summary: Chrome 148 DevTools verification: all four scenario buttons still toggle one active aria-pressed state, the server-side dedup button now carries a visible 'breaks pipelines' badge, and selecting it shows a critical pipeline-breaking collision banner plus the null|null collision logs, four checklist items, and the URGENT summary. Current feature conformance route reports 5 pass / 0 fail with no console messages.
